bug_reverify.evidence: cmd/mindspec/next.go RunE: emitOnly path threads args (L57-59 -> runEmitOnly which honors args[0] at L322-328), but the claim path (L213) calls next.SelectWork(items, pick) WITHOUT args. internal/next/select.go SelectWork returns items[0] when pick==0 (L26-27, and L14-16 single-item returns items[0]). next.go L208-210 prints 'Defaulting to first item' so a passed positional is silently dropped and the wrong bead is claimed/worktree-created/in_progress. Long help L37 ('Accepts an optional positional bead ID') sits under the --emit-only paragraph but reads as general — confirmed over-broad.

No release/abandon/unclaim/drop file in cmd/mindspec/; rootCmd.AddCommand list (root.go L216-251) registers no such verb. Mis-claim must be hand-unwound (bd update --assignee '' + git worktree remove).

internal/next/beads.go ClaimBead L162-167 wraps failure as 'claim failed (may already be claimed): %s' over CombinedOutput, masking the real stderr (e.g. depends_on_id schema error). internal/doctor/beads.go checkBdVersionFloor L284-317 checks version only; the two LookPath uses (L580 merge-driver resolution, L450 comment) are unrelated — no schema-drift check and no multiple-bd-on-PATH check exist.

internal/executor/mindspec_executor.go InitSpecWorkspace L84-89 calls gitutil.CreateBranch(specBranch, "HEAD"). gitutil/gitops.go CreateBranch L88-102 runs `git branch -- name HEAD`. grep over internal/gitutil finds no DefaultBranch/symbolic-ref/remote show/origin/HEAD/Fetch helper — no default-branch detection or fetch today, so spec branches off stale local HEAD.

summary: All four defects independently re-verified in the current tree by reading the cited files; none already-fixed or misdescribed. The spec's Background lines/columns are accurate (R1 next.go L37/L58/L208-216 + select.go L26-27; R2 no verb in root.go; R3 beads.go L162-168 + doctor L284-317; R4 executor L85-89 + gitops L88-102 + no gitutil default-branch helper). Each requirement targets the genuine root cause and the ACs pin it: R1 AC asserts the named bead is claimed AND a not-in-ready-set ID errors instead of items[0], plus a help golden test; R2 AC asserts open+assignee-cleared, WorktreeOps.Remove called (no raw git worktree remove, satisfying ADR-0030), cursor rewind, and dirty refuse-without/proceed-with --force; R3 AC asserts the real stderr (depends_on_id) survives and not flattened, plus Warn for schema mismatch and 2-bd PATH with OK happy path; R4 AC asserts branch from origin/<detected-default> after fetch (not hardcoded main) and offline fallback to HEAD with WARN. ADR coverage (workflow->ADR-0035, execution->ADR-0030) is correct and both impacted domains are bound. Scope/Non-Goals are coherent and the open questions are resolved. No over-claims found.
